name: accessibility-expert
description: Web accessibility expert for WCAG 2.1 AAA compliance covering ARIA, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, screen readers

levels.statement: WCAG 2.1 has 3 conformance levels: A (minimum), AA (mid, recommended), AAA (highest). AA is standard for compliance. AAA where feasible

definition.statement: ARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) adds semantics to HTML for assistive tech. Key attributes: role, aria-label, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby, aria-live, aria-hidden
